'''sadudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kykeon|kykeon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kykeon|kykeon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædidhith|sædidhith]] || [[word:sædidhij|sædidhij]] || [[word:sædidhish|sædidhish]] || [[word:sædidhi|sædidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadududhuth|sadududhuth]] || [[word:sadududhuj|sadududhuj]] || [[word:sadududhush|sadududhush]] || [[word:sadududhu|sadududhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadudhuth|sadudhuth]] || [[word:sadudhuj|sadudhuj]] || [[word:sadudhush|sadudhush]] || [[word:sadudhu|sadudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadufdhuth|sadufdhuth]] || [[word:sadufdhuj|sadufdhuj]] || [[word:sadufdhush|sadufdhush]] || [[word:sadufdhuf|sadufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadudhuthu|sadudhuthu]] || [[word:sadudhuju|sadudhuju]] || [[word:sadudhushu|sadudhushu]] || [[word:sadudhuku|sadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadudhuth|sadudhuth]] || [[word:sadudhuj|sadudhuj]] || [[word:sadudhush|sadudhush]] || [[word:sadudhu|sadudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadudhuthul|sadudhuthul]] || [[word:sadudhujul|sadudhujul]] || [[word:sadudhushul|sadudhushul]] || [[word:sadudhukul|sadudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadudhuthuthu|sadudhuthuthu]] || [[word:sadudhujuju|sadudhujuju]] || [[word:sadudhushushu|sadudhushushu]] || [[word:sadudhuku|sadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadudhuthun|sadudhuthun]] || [[word:sadudhujun|sadudhujun]] || [[word:sadudhushun|sadudhushun]] || [[word:sadudhukun|sadudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadudhuthuoro|sadudhuthuoro]] || [[word:sadudhujuoro|sadudhujuoro]] || [[word:sadudhushuoro|sadudhushuoro]] || [[word:sadudhukuoro|sadudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
